$comment: Capsule-Pro Schema Placement POLICY (documentation only) — machine-readable companion to docs/database/SCHEMA_PLACEMENT_POLICY.md. NOT consumed by any script as of 2026-06-29 (build-live-schema.mjs does not exist; generate-full-schema.mjs reads manifest/prisma-options.config.json, not this file). The live @@schema placement is the hand-maintained multiSchema.entitySchema map in prisma-options.config.json / manifest.config.yaml; this file records the domain→schema rules those maps should follow. Sources of truth: docs/database/README.md, manifest/source/*.manifest filenames, and the known-good multi-schema schema.prisma at commit 923baaa8. NEVER place a tenant entity in public.
decisionOrder: 2: sourceFileRules — match the .manifest source file the entity is authored in
3: namePatterns — match the entity name against a documented domain pattern
4: sharedTenantInfra — generic tenant-wide infrastructure not owned by one module -> tenant
5: fail with UNMAPPED_SCHEMA_PLACEMENT (never fall back to public)

schemas.platform: SaaS/account layer. Tenants, accounts, platform audit, sent emails, platform jobs, API keys. NOT normal tenant business data; no tenant_id.
schemas.core: Shared immutable reference data: enums, units, conversion tables, status types, system functions. Cross-domain, not tenant-scoped.
schemas.tenant: Shared tenant infrastructure used by multiple domains: locations, settings, documents, outbox/events, generic tenant-wide records not owned by one business module.
schemas.tenant_crm: Sales/customer lifecycle: leads, clients, contacts, proposals, deals, follow-ups, CRM interactions.
schemas.tenant_events: Booked event operations: events, battle boards, event imports, timelines, guest lists, event budgets, waitlists, event setup sessions, command boards.
schemas.tenant_inventory: Inventory and purchasing: inventory items, stock, suppliers/vendors, purchase orders, shipments, reorder suggestions, storage locations, pricing tiers.
schemas.tenant_kitchen: Kitchen/food operations: recipes, prep lists, prep tasks, dishes, menus, method videos, bulk prep, allergens, food-safety QA, temperature logs, stations, kitchen waste, constraint override audit.
schemas.tenant_staff: Workforce/HR operations: employees, schedules, shifts, time entries, payroll, performance, staff availability, training, labor budgets, staff disciplinary/corrective actions.
schemas.tenant_admin: Tenant control-plane metadata: reports, workflows, notifications, permissions/roles config, admin audit, generic approval/versioning/configuration records, email/sms templates, rate limits, seed data. Do NOT put operational records here just because an admin clicks the button.
schemas.tenant_accounting: Accounting/finance: bank accounts, chart of accounts, invoices, payments, payment methods, revenue recognition, collections, payroll accounting, finance budgets unless clearly event-owned.
schemas.tenant_facilities: Facilities/maintenance: facility schedules, work orders, equipment/facility maintenance.
schemas.tenant_logistics: Routing/dispatch/delivery logistics: routes, dispatches, transport coordination.

sourceFileRules.$comment: First match wins, evaluated top-to-bottom. 'match' is a JS-style regex tested (case-insensitive) against the source .manifest filename (basename). Specific rules precede general ones.

namePatterns.$comment: Fallback when no source file rule matches (e.g. an entity authored in a multi-domain file). First match wins, tested (case-insensitive) against the entity name.

sharedTenantInfra.$comment: Rule 4: generic tenant-wide infrastructure not owned by any single business module. Only reached if rules 1-3 do not match.

ambiguityGuidance.$comment: Documented judgement calls. These are encoded as explicit entitySchema overrides (rule 1) when the default rule is wrong for a given entity.
ambiguityGuidance.QACorrectiveAction: tenant_kitchen if food-safety / process correction; tenant_staff if employee discipline / performance correction. Default tenant_kitchen (authored in qa-rules).
ambiguityGuidance.Budget: tenant_accounting unless it is clearly an EventBudget (event-owned -> tenant_events) or LaborBudget (staff-owned -> tenant_staff).
ambiguityGuidance.Equipment: tenant_kitchen for kitchen equipment; tenant_facilities for facility/building equipment.
ambiguityGuidance.EntityVersion / VersionedEntity / Versio: tenant_admin unless tied to a specific operational domain.

failure.messageTemplate: UNMAPPED_SCHEMA_PLACEMENT: cannot place entity '{entity}' (source: {sourceFile}). No entitySchema override, no sourceFileRule, no namePattern, and not shared tenant infra matched. Add an override to manifest.config.yaml (projections.prisma.options.multiSchema.entitySchema) OR add a domain rule to manifest/schema-placement.rules.json. Fields: {fields}.
